title: Closed a 1300 points gain in this fall.
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
https://preview.redd.it/mucvstputo3h1.jpg?width=1272&format=pjpg&auto=webp&s=45b99aceeb80a8eff61e1eb13b587468a901e37d

The trade was given by my system 3 days ago and I had place the trade without any second thought and it gave me huge win.

Price still going down but I am happy with the gain even after the terrific volatility.

My ML system has already predicted the fall earlier and I sticked to it and the result is infront of you all.
